evals.prompt: We just ran harness init on this Laravel monorepo. Replace the stub AGENTS.md with a project-specific one and set up CLAUDE.md.
evals.expected_output: Agent scans .agents/skills/ and harness layout; writes tailored AGENTS.md at repo root with installed skills and SDD chain; writes CLAUDE.md with only @AGENTS.md; does not copy harness template verbatim.

evals.prompt: Refresh AGENTS.md — we installed execution-gitlab-issue and code-reviewer since last time. Keep our Portuguese chat bullet.
evals.expected_output: Agent updates skills and workflow sections from .agents/skills/, preserves hand-edited language bullet, refreshes CLAUDE.md pointer if needed.

evals.prompt: Generate AGENTS.md for apps/billing-api/ in this monorepo. Only the billing-api folder uses NextStage harness.
evals.expected_output: Agent resolves product_root as apps/billing-api/, lists skills and paths relative to that folder, writes AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md there.
